script.arcTitle: Switzerland v Colombia: A Long Night at BC Place
script.openingLine: Welcome to Replay: Switzerland meet Colombia in the round of 16 at BC Place Vancouver.

moments.spokenLine: Switzerland meet Colombia in the round of 16 at BC Place Vancouver.
moments.explainer: The replay begins with the knockout stage and the venue set.

moments.spokenLine: Colombia win a confirmed corner; the count is 0–1.
moments.explainer: Colombia make the early set-piece impression.

moments.spokenLine: Switzerland win a confirmed corner; the count is 1–1.
moments.explainer: Switzerland answer, bringing the corner count level.

moments.spokenLine: Colombia win a confirmed corner; the count is 1–2.
moments.explainer: Colombia move back in front on corners.

moments.spokenLine: Colombia win a confirmed corner; the count is 1–3.
moments.explainer: The set-piece balance continues to favour Colombia.

moments.spokenLine: Colombia drive a sustained spell: 4 shots and 14 dangerous actions.
moments.explainer: This is the clearest first-half surge, built on both attempts and attacking activity.

moments.spokenLine: Colombia win a confirmed corner; the count is 1–4.
moments.explainer: Another corner extends Colombia’s set-piece advantage.

moments.spokenLine: Colombia win a confirmed corner; the count remains 1–4.
moments.explainer: The corner arrives without changing the recorded count.

moments.spokenLine: Switzerland 0–0 Colombia at the interval.
moments.explainer: The pressure has not produced a goal, and the match remains level.

moments.spokenLine: Granit XHAKA is shown a card for Switzerland.
moments.explainer: Switzerland’s first recorded booking arrives after the interval.

moments.spokenLine: Denis ZAKARIA is shown a card for Switzerland.
moments.explainer: A second Switzerland booking follows in the same half.

moments.spokenLine: Luis SUAREZ is shown a card for Colombia.
moments.explainer: Colombia now enter the disciplinary record too.

moments.spokenLine: Switzerland win a confirmed corner; the count is 2–4.
moments.explainer: Switzerland add a set piece and trim the corner gap.

moments.spokenLine: Switzerland win a confirmed corner; the count is 3–4.
moments.explainer: Another Switzerland corner brings the count closer still.

moments.spokenLine: Davinson SANCHEZ is shown a card for Colombia.
moments.explainer: Colombia receive another booking as the match continues.

moments.spokenLine: Colombia win a confirmed corner; the count is 3–5.
moments.explainer: Colombia restore their two-corner lead.

moments.spokenLine: Colombia drive a sustained spell: 4 shots and 11 dangerous actions.
moments.explainer: The pressure returns in extra time, with Colombia again leading the attacking spell.

moments.spokenLine: Colombia win a confirmed corner; the count is 3–6.
moments.explainer: A further corner strengthens Colombia’s set-piece advantage.

moments.spokenLine: Miro MUHEIM is shown a card for Switzerland.
moments.explainer: Switzerland add another booking during the extended contest.

moments.spokenLine: Colombia win a confirmed corner; the count is 3–7.
moments.explainer: Colombia finish this stretch with a commanding corner count.

moments.spokenLine: Switzerland drive a sustained spell: 3 shots and 11 dangerous actions.
moments.explainer: Late on, Switzerland produce their strongest recorded attacking passage.

moments.spokenLine: Switzerland 0–0 Colombia. 4–3 on penalties.
moments.explainer: The match stays goalless, and the penalty count decides the round of 16 tie.

chapters.text: At kick-off, Switzerland meet Colombia in the round of 16 at BC Place Vancouver.
In the 4th minute, Colombia win a confirmed corner. The corner count is 0–1.
In the 13th minute, Switzerland win a confirmed corner. The corner count is 1–1.
In the 20th minute, Colombia win a confirmed corner. The corner count is 1–2.
In the 38th minute, Colombia win a confirmed corner. The corner count is 1–3.
Between the 30th and 40th minutes, Colombia drive a sustained spell: 4 shots and 14 dangerous actions.
In the 39th minute, Colombia win a confirmed corner. The corner count is 1–4.
In the 42nd minute, Colombia win a confirmed corner. The corner count is 1–4.
At half-time, Switzerland 0–0 Colombia.
In the 51st minute, Granit XHAKA is shown a card for Switzerland.
In the 59th minute, Denis ZAKARIA is shown a card for Switzerland.
In the 60th minute, Luis SUAREZ is shown a card for Colombia.
In the 82nd minute, Switzerland win a confirmed corner. The corner count is 2–4.
In the 92nd minute, Switzerland win a confirmed corner. The corner count is 3–4.
In the 94th minute, Davinson SANCHEZ is shown a card for Colombia.
In the 97th minute, Colombia win a confirmed corner. The corner count is 3–5.
Between the 90th and 100th minutes, Colombia drive a sustained spell: 4 shots and 11 dangerous actions.
In the 100th minute, Colombia win a confirmed corner. The corner count is 3–6.
In the 105th minute, Miro MUHEIM is shown a card for Switzerland.
In the 105th minute, Colombia win a confirmed corner. The corner count is 3–7.
Between the 110th and 120th minutes, Switzerland drive a sustained spell: 3 shots and 11 dangerous actions.
At full-time, Switzerland 0–0 Colombia. 4–3 on penalties.
